candidateContexts.label: ts-notification-service notify dispatch flow (mail send + queue publish)
ts-order-other-service HTTP command/query surface with authority gating
ts-order-other-service Order persistence and state-transition lifecycle
ts-order-service HTTP command/query surface with authority gating (partial: OrderService/Impl not in this chunk)

candidateCovers.label: ts-order-other-service order lifecycle Cech measurement surface (money-amount, order-status-code sections observed across entity/service)

notes: queue name comes from a shared Queues constant not defined in this file
the order-cancel-success branch builds a narrower email model (username, price only) than the other three notify events
mail credentials appear as env-var defaults with a literal fallback password in this config file
the broad permitAll matcher for the orderOther path prefix is registered before the verb-specific role matchers on the same prefix
the pay and status-modify endpoints mutate order state on the branch reached via an HTTP GET route rather than PUT/POST
order status codes are read only through the shared OrderStatus enum accessor at this site, not as raw integer literals
a commented-out rabbitmq/cloud-stream block is present but not active configuration

here the verb-specific role matchers for the order path are registered before the broad permitAll matcher on the same prefix, the opposite matcher order from the sibling ts-order-other-service SecurityConfig
OrderService/OrderServiceImpl are not part of this chunk's assigned files, so the service-layer body behind these endpoints was not read here
